extracted.source_quote: Apex Machining confirmed it was awarded a $6.5M multi-year IDIQ to produce machined actuator assemblies for a Navy program

headline: Furnace outage idles Titan Castings shift

extracted.source_quote: told customers to expect multi-week slips on titanium billet shipments

headline: Beacon Aviation ramps on new program starts

extracted.source_quote: Demand for Beacon Aerospace components is spiking as several new aircraft programs enter production

headline: Cobalt Alloys hit with source-inspection hold

headline: Chatter: Ironclad may have taken a bracket program

extracted.source_quote: Unconfirmed industry chatter suggests Ironclad Components may have won a bracket program, though nothing has been announced and sources are hedging.

headline: Summit Turbine wins $1.1M Air Force award

extracted.source_quote: Summit Turbine was awarded a $1.1M Air Force contract for turbine blade machining, its first federal award in the segment.

headline: Vanguard Aerospace breaks ground on new plant

extracted.source_quote: Vanguard Aerospace announced a facility expansion to add 5-axis machining capacity
Aluminum prices climbed for a third straight month on energy costs, pressuring margins across the machining supply base, with several shops signaling quote increases.
Northwind Systems posted a surge of engineering and supply-chain openings, a signal it is staffing up for a production ramp.

headline: New AS9100 revision affects certified shops

extracted.source_quote: A new revision to AS9100 introduces additional process-control requirements that certified aerospace suppliers will need to demonstrate at their next audit.
